THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPONUEVO, RICARDO IND/DBA ROMOCO DESIGNERS GROUP INGRAM, JAMES H., IND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
